AdditionalAttributes.ml_enriched_product_description: Fluffy In-Wash Scent Booster Cloud Nine brings fabulous fragrance, with 20 weeks of freshness for your laundry. Order online from Woolworths today.
AdditionalAttributes.description:
Fluffy Laundry In Wash Scent Booster Beads Cloud Nine brings long lasting freshness and leaves an delectably desirable scent you can't stop smelling.

Fluffy Laundry In-Wash Scent Booster Beads Float away to your own Fluffy paradise, where every cloud is lined with gold and the azure sky goes on forever.

Breathe in the fresh scent of bluebells as a gentle breeze drifts by... it's going to be a great day!

- Perfume for our laundry
- Adds long lasting freshness to your wash
- Brings joy to your everyday!

Suitable for front and top loader machines.

1. Pour directly into the washing machine drum (do not pour into the detergentsoftener tray)
2. Add in your clotheslaundry
3. Add your laundry products as usual Use half or full cap depending on your desired fragrance intensity and your loads volume.

Pack size: 250g

Endless possibilities - use Fluffy Scent Booster to freshen up your home, wardrobes, car, smelly shoes ;)

LONG LASTING FRESHNESS: Clothes stay fresh for longer (from wash to wear)

PERFUME FOR YOUR LAUNDRY: Breath in the fresh scent of bluebells and relax!

SUITABLE FOR ALL FABRICS: In-Wash Scent Boosters are safe to use for all fabrics.

EASY TO USE: Just add Fluffy Laundry In-Wash Scent Booster Beads directly into the washing machine drum, then add in your clothes and laundry products as usual

PACK SIZE: Use a lot or a little depending on your desired fragrance intensity and your load’s volume. Our 250g Fluffy In Wash Scent Booster can be used for up to 10 washes

TgaAttributes.StorageInstructions: Store in a cool, dry area out of sunlight.

Cold Power PLUS Odour Fighter Laundry Liquid Washing Detergent 2L, 40 Washloads, Outstanding Stain Removal

Cold Power PLUS Odour Fighter Laundry Liquid Detergent delivers outstanding stain removal, effective even in cold water and short cycles. Powered by Cold Power’s NEW & IMPROVED Cold Wash Action formula, featuring a unique blend of enzymes and fragrance technology to actively tackle tough everyday stains and control malodours

Backed by 50+ Years of Cold Wash Expertise, Count on Cold Power PLUS Odour Fighter Laundry Liquid for visibly clean & cared for laundry, even washing in quick cycles.

Washing in cold water saves up to 80% energy & is better for the planet, whilst being gentler on your clothes.*

*When switching from warm to cold water. Please refer to https://www.sustainability.vic.gov.au/energy-efficiency-and-reducing-emissions/save-energy-in-the-home/reduce-washing-machine-costs-at-home



Backed by 50+ Years of Cold Wash Expertise for trusted, reliable cleaning results

Cold Wash Action formula uses a unique blend of enzymes to deliver outstanding stain removal in cold water

Removes Tough Sweat Stains

Helps Control Bad Odours

Australian Made

AdditionalAttributes.ml_enriched_product_description: Tired of tough stains? Cold Power Laundry Capsules Advanced Clean is an effective and easy solution for cold water washing. Shop now at Woolworths.
AdditionalAttributes.description:
Cold Power Advanced Clean Laundry Detergent Capsules (29 Washes), Outstanding Stain Removal in Cold Water, Suitable for Front and Top Loader

Cold Power Advanced Clean Laundry Detergent Capsules (29 Washes) - For outstanding results in cold water.

Discover outstanding clean in cold water, the easy way with these advanced clean triple washing detergent capsules from Cold Power. The three-in-one formula of these laundry capsules delivers outstanding stain removal even in cold water while offering a fresh scent and brightness so you can enjoy visibly clean laundry that smells fresh and clean.
Cold water washing saves up to 80% less energy?, therefore reducing the environmental impact of you doing your laundry while being gentler on your clothes.

How to use: Recommended dosage is one capsule per load or 2 capsules for heavy loads. First place the washing detergent capsules directly into the empty drum, then add clothes on top of the capsule. Do not place in dispensing drawer. Not suitable for hand wash.

These washing detergent capsules use 90% less water in production**, are made with 92% biodegradable ingredients#, contain less than 0.5% phosphorus, and are also greywater septic safe. Keep out of sight and reach of children.

Product benefits at a glance:
Effective stain removal
Outstanding clean
Fresh scent
Unique cold water enzyme formula
Suitable for front loader and top loader washing machines
For approx. 29 washloads

?when switching from warm to cold water
#Related to organic ingredients according to OECD 301/302
**Compared to cold power liquids

Outstanding Stain Removal: With its cold water laundry detergent enzyme, these Cold Power laundry detergent capsules effectively remove tough stains, so you can enjoy visibly clean laundry

Outstanding Clean in Cold Water: The Cold Power capsules provide outstanding clean for your clothes, even in cold washes and are suitable for both front and top loader washing machines

The Easy Way: Cold Power capsules deliver 3 benefits in 1 easy to use cap, providing outstanding stain removal, a fresh scent and brightness to your clothes

More Sustainable: Washing your clothes in cold water saves up to 80% less energy?, helping to reduce the environmental impact whilst being gentler on your clothes

Better For The Planet: These laundry capsules use 90% less water in production**, contain 92% biodegradable ingredients#, and are also greywater septic safe

TgaAttributes.StorageInstructions: Keep in original packaging. Store away from heat, moisture and sunlight.

AdditionalAttributes.storageinstructions: STORAGE INSTRUCTIONS (heading);Store in a cool, dry place out of direct sunlight below 25 C.
AdditionalAttributes.ml_enriched_product_description: Discover Strike Bleach. A versatile multi-surface cleaner, it's ideal for whitening and removing laundry stains. Shop now at Woolworths.

TgaAttributes.ProductWarnings: CAUTION KEEP OUT OF REACH OF CHILDREN  READ SAFETY DIRECTIONS BEFORE OPENING OR USING  SAFETY DIRECTIONS WARNING: Corrosive. May produce severe burns. Attacks skin and eyes. Ensure adequate ventilation when using. Vapour may be harmful. May give off dangerous gas if mixed with other products. Avoid contact with eyes and skin. Wear eye protection and protective gloves when mixing or using. Ensure adequate ventilation when using. Mix with water only. Do not mix with hot water. Wash hands after using. Cap should be closed firmly when not in use. Keep bottle upright at all times. NOT TO BE TAKEN.  FIRST AID: For advice, contact a Poisons Information Centre (e.g. phone 13 11 26) or a doctor (at once). If swallowed, do NOT induce vomiting. If in eyes, hold eyelids apart and flush the eye continuously with running water. Continue flushing until advised to stop by Poisons Information Centre or a doctor, or for at least 15 minutes. If skin or hair contact occurs, remove contaminated clothing and flush skin and hair with running water.
TgaAttributes.StorageInstructions: STORAGE INSTRUCTIONS (heading);Store in a cool, dry place out of direct sunlight below 25 C.

Products.FullDescription: Fluffy Fabric Softener Concentrate Spice Allure

AdditionalAttributes.storageinstructions: Store in a cool, dry area out of sunlight.
AdditionalAttributes.ml_enriched_product_description: Discover Fluffy Ultra Fabric Softener Spice Allure 2L. A fragrant product that softens, it's ideal for laundry. Add it to your cart at Woolworths.
AdditionalAttributes.description:
Fluffy Fragrance Temptations Spice Allure Fabric Softener Conditioner leaves an irresistible scented trail and leaves your clothes and fabrics feeling oh-so soft. Suitable for front and top loader machines, and keeps your clothes looking newer for longer.

When you leave behind an irresistible trail of eau de Spice Allure, people will talk. "What's that tantalising fragrance?" "Is it designer?" Your secret's safe with us *wink*.

Spice Allure - for those who can resist everything except temptation.

- Leaves clothes and fabrics feeling oh-so soft
- Long-lasting freshness... yes please!
- Keeps clothes looking newer for longer
- Makes ironing easier (thank us later)
- Reduces static cling so your laundry is as 'ex-static' as you are

Proudly Made in Australia with a recyclable bottle and cap.

Grey Water and Septic Tank Safe. Suitable for top loader and front loader washing machines.

The Fluffy Fragrance Temptations Spice Allure Concentrated Liquid Fabric Softener Conditioner in 2L can be used for 100 Washes.

Directions for use:
Fill Cap as Shown (1/2 Cap)
In your Top Loader - Fluffy can be added to your machine's fabric softener conditioner dispensing unit or diluted and added to the final rinse.
In your Front Loader - Add Fluffy to your machine's fabric conditioner dispensing unit (often marked with a flower).

SOFTEN YOUR CLOTHES AND FABRICS: Fluffy Concentrated Liquid Fabric Softener Conditioner is suitable for front & top loader machines to soften your clothes and fabrics

FRAGRANCE TEMPTATIONS: Leave an irresistible trail of Spice Allure fragrance with Fluffy Fragrance Temptations

REDUCES STATIC CLING: so your laundry is as 'ex-static' as you are

PACK SIZE: Our 2L Fluffy Concentrated Fabric Conditioner can be used for 100 washes

AUSTRALIAN MADE: Our Fluffy Fragrance Temptations Fabric Softener Conditioners are proudly made in Australia

TgaAttributes.ProductWarnings: Keep out of reach of children.
TgaAttributes.StorageInstructions: Store in a cool, dry area out of sunlight.

AdditionalAttributes.ml_enriched_product_description: Discover Who Gives A Crap 3Ply Tissues. An eco-friendly product with 100% bamboo, ideal for everyday needs. Available at Woolworths online.
AdditionalAttributes.description:
Looking for soft, sustainable tissues that can handle everything from the strongest sneezes to the softest sniffles? Look no further. We’re an Aussie-owned company that makes eco-friendly 100% bamboo tissues. Many people don’t realise that bamboo is a grass, not a tree. It grows incredibly quickly, making it a more sustainable source for tissues. And with 140 3 ply sheets in every box, you’re getting plenty of tissues to cover all your everyday needs. But the best part? We’re proudly B Corp and FSC certified, and we donate 50% of our profits to clean water and sanitation projects. So every time you choose our tissues, you’re helping us make a real snifference.

Please advise in your personal shopper notes your preferred colour or design when reviewing your order at checkout. The colour or design delivered is subject to availability.

AdditionalAttributes.ml_enriched_product_description: Cuddly Ultra Fabric Softener Sensitive is a gentle choice for sensitive skin. It's hypoallergenic and dermatologically tested for softness. Shop now!
AdditionalAttributes.description:
Cuddly Sensitive Concentrated Liquid Fabric Softener Conditioner 2L 80 Washes is Made in Australia. Gentle on Sensitive Skin, Hypoallergenic, Dermatologist Tested and is a Sensitive Choice® Proud Supporter of the Eczema Association Australasia Inc. Designed for Luxurious Softness, Easy Iron, Reduces wrinkles, Reduces Static, Helps clothes look newer for longer and Fast Drying.

Cuddly Concentrate Hypoallergenic Liquid Fabric Softener Conditioner is gentle on sensitive skin.

Delicate skin needs the gentlest touch which is why we've formulated Cuddly Sensitive. It's hypoallergenic, has been dermatologically tested and contains no dyes.

Cuddly Sensitive gives that little bit extra to show you care.

- Luxurious Softness
- Gentle Fragrance
- Hypoallergenic
- Dermatologically tested
- Free from dyes
- Sensitive Choice
- Proud supporter of the Eczema Association Australasia (EAA)
- Grey Water and Septic Tank safe
- 100% recyclable packaging
- Made in Australia

Directions for use
Top Loader - Cuddly can be added to your machine's fabric conditioner dispensing unit or diluted and added to the final rinse.
Front Loader - Add Cuddly to your machine's fabric conditioner dispenser unit only. This is often marked with a flower.

Cuddly is ready to use so there is no need to dilute. Never pour directly onto fabrics.

Size: 2L Liquid Fabric Softener Conditioner Concentrate
Washes: 80 washes



FABRIC SOFTENER CONDITIONER: Cuddly Concentrate Sensitive Liquid Fabric Softener Conditioner is gentle on sensitive skin

HYPOALLERGENIC AND DERMATOLOGICALLY TESTED: Cuddly Concentrate Sensitive fabric conditioner is hypoallergenic and dermatologically tested.

DELICATE ON SENSITIVE SKIN: Cuddly Sensitive fabric conditioner is a Sensitive Choice®, Proud supporter of Eczema Association Australasia Inc

FREE FROM: any dyes and has a gentle fragrance

AUSTRALIAN MADE: Proudly made in Australia

AdditionalAttributes.ml_enriched_product_description: Facing messes? Viva Select A Size Double Length Paper Towel is a convenient and effective solution for any mess. Order online from Woolworths today.
AdditionalAttributes.description:
VIVA SELECT-A-SIZE Towel offers shorter length sheets so you can tear off as little or as much as you need when dealing with mess. Use less for a smaller mess. The Double length roll has twice the amount of sheets (180 vs 90) so it lasts longer, meaning less roll changes.

VIVA SELECT-A-SIZE Double Length Paper Towel offers shorter length sheets so you can tear off as little or as much as you need when dealing with mess.
The Double Length paper towel roll has twice the number of sheets^ (180 sheets vs 90 sheets) meaning you can replace it less often.
VIVA SELECT-A-SIZE Double Length Paper Towel cleans even better when wet, meaning tough, sticky marks, dirt and grease wipe away with ease. Using our unique Quick Clean Texture, VIVA Paper Towel is designed to absorb fast.


Shorter length sheets So you can tear off as little or as much as you need with dealing with mess.

Unique Quick Clean Texture Designed to absorb FAST

Cleans Even Better When Wet Allowing you to easily deal with life’s thrills and spills

Fast Absorbing

Feel extra cared for with our Aloe Vera facial tissues!

 

Our Gold 4 ply layers of softness and luxury has been combined with the soothing properties of aloe vera in these facial tissues. Gentle on sensitive skin, these are perfect for those who want just a little more extra comfort.

 

The Forest Stewardship Council (FSC) promotes environmentally appropriate, socially beneficial, and economically viable management of the world’s forests. The FSC label is our guarantee that in buying Quilton Gold 4 Ply 100s Aloe Vera Facial Tissue, you are supporting forest protection for present and future generations. This tissue box is also made with a minimum of 80% recycled cardboard.

 

We’re locally based in Australia with our manufacturing warehouses located in Sydney, Brisbane, Perth and Melbourne. It takes over 600 people across the nation to bring Quilton to you and with your continued support we’re far and away Australia’s most loved tissue.

Kleenex Complete Clean Toilet Paper has twice as many sheets so you spend less time changing the roll.

Kleenex Complete Clean Toilet Paper with unique CleanRipple texture has a 3-in-1 combination of softness, strength & absorbency for a comfortable and reliable clean. Double Length has twice as many sheets as regular roll which means you can spend less time changing the roll.

Recommended for use alongside Kleenex Flushables to help you feel shower fresh, Kleenex Toilet Paper is hypoallergenic, biodegradable and septic tank safe.

Made from ethically sourced fibre that promotes the sustainable management of forests, Kleenex Toilet Paper has earned Forest Stewardship Council (FSC) certification - the highest possible independent standard for responsible forest management. By choosing Kleenex Toilet Paper you can be assured that the product you're purchasing does not come from high conversation value forests, which may be home to rare, threatened or endangered animals and ecosystems.

Double Length Twice as many sheets as regular roll which means you spend less time changing the roll.

CleanRipple Texture Specifically designed to provide a 3-in-1 combination of softness, strength and absorbency.

30% less plastic packaging Kleenex Double Length has 30% less plastic packaging per sheet than regular length Kleenex.

25% less transport related emissions Kleenex Double Length produces 25% less transport related emissions than regular length Kleenex (calculated per sheet, from point of manufacture to shelf)

Made in Australia Kleenex Toilet Paper has been made in South Australia since 1966.

NOW IN 3 PLY. Sorbent Hypo-Allergenic toilet tissue is free from ink, dye and fragrance, and suitable for sensitive skin.

NOW IN 3 PLY. No matter where we're from, or what we do, one thing's for sure - we all have to spend time on the loo. We've supported Aussies through and through, we first wiped a bum back in 1952! That's true! With more than 70 years of looking after your crack, it's no wonder Aussies love us back. Our Hypo-Allergenic toilet tissue is perfect for ‘down-there'. Free from fragrance, dyes and ink, for a little extra care.  Always soft, and always strong; because when it's all said and done, all we want is a clean, fresh bum.

Extra Gentle - pH balanced for comfort on skin

Extra Thick - Thick sheets for more protection

Extra Soft - Soft sheets for more gentle comfort

PEFC certified

Ajax Spray n' Wipe Vanilla & Berries Kitchen & Bathroom is a Multi-Purpose Cleaner Trigger Surface Spray; Made in Australia with a 100% recycled bottle.

Life is easy when you Spray n' Wipe! Our Australian made formula cleans your home, cutting through grease, grime and stains. With our added freshness boosters in Ajax Spray n' Wipe Vanilla & Berries, you'll have your home smelling and feeling fresh and clean

- Multipurpose spray. Suitable for all surfaces including Kitchen and Bathroom
- Cuts through grease and grime
- Made in a 100% recycled and recyclable bottle
- Proudly Made in Australia

To Clean:
Simply spray surface then wipe clean with a damp cloth. No need to scrub or rinse

Size: 475mL Trigger Surface Spray
Scent: Vanilla & Berries

Always read the label. Follow the directions for use



MULTIPURPOSE CLEANER: Ajax Spray n' Wipe Vanilla and Berries cleaner cuts through grease, grime and stains and is a trigger spray suitable for multi surfaces

FRESHNESS BOOSTERS: With added freshness boosters in a vanilla & berries scent to have your home smelling and feeling fresh and clean

TO USE: Simply spray the surface and wipe it off with a damp cloth. No need to scrub or rinse

RECYCLABLE: Bottle made from 100% recycled content. Does not include trigger

AUSTRALIAN MADE: Proudly made in Australia

TgaAttributes.ProductWarnings: Do not apply to porous, cracked, nonglazed or unsealed surfaces, natural marble, terrazzo, or aluminium.Not recommended for use on polished, varnished or lacquered surfaces. Wipe immediately clean from paintwork and old surfaces. Refer to surface care instructions and spot test if unsure.Keep out of reach of children. Do not spray product towards eyes. If product contacts eyes, rinse thoroughly with water. Ensure adequate ventilation in confined spaces. Do not mix or use with any other chemicals.

AdditionalAttributes.suitablefor: For all toilet bowls except stainless steel.
AdditionalAttributes.storageinstructions: Store in a cool place below 30°C.
AdditionalAttributes.ml_enriched_product_description: Tired of toilet odours? Harpic Toilet Cleaner Fresh Power Marine Splash offers powerful, fresh cleaning for a truly hygienic toilet. Shop now at Woolworths.
AdditionalAttributes.description:
Harpic Fresh Power Marine Splash hygienically cleans and kills odour-causing bacteria.

Harpic Fresh Power has a fresh fragrance and the power to kill odour-causing bacteria(E.Coli). It helps leave your toilet clean, hygienic and smelling fresh. Household grade disinfectant. Contains the active ingredient Benzalkonium Chloride (0.34% w/v).
Directions for use:
1. Tightly squeeze pads on side of cap and unsrew. Use undiluted.
2. Direct nozzle under the toilet bowl rim and squeeze bottle. Apply Harpic Fresh Power to entire bowl. To achieve best cleaning result, leave in the toilet bowl for 10 minutes.
3. With a toilet brush, thoroughly brush entire bowl.
4. Then flush to leave the bowl sparkling clean and fresh.

Harpic Fresh Power Liquid Toilet Cleaner Marine Splash 700ml

Harpic Fresh Power has a fresh fragrance and the power to kill odour-causing bacteria(E.Coli)

It helps leave your toilet clean, hygienic and smelling fresh.

Household grade disinfectant.

Contains the active ingredient Benzalkonium Chloride (0.34% w/v).

TgaAttributes.ProductWarnings: Always read the label. Follow directions for use.
TgaAttributes.StorageInstructions: Store in a cool place below 30°C.

TgaAttributes.ProductWarnings: CAUTION KEEP OUT OF REACH OF CHILDREN READ SAFETY DIRECTIONS BEFORE OPENING OR USING  DO NOT SWALLOW.  SAFETY DIRECTIONS WARNING: Will irritate eyes. Avoid contact with eyes. CAUTION: KEEP OUT OF REACH OF CHILDREN. FIRST AID: For advice, contact a Poisons Information Centre (e.g. phone 13 11 26) or a doctor (at once). If swallowed, do NOT induce vomiting. If in eyes, hold eyelids apart and flush the eye continuously with running water. Continue flushing until advised to stop by a Poisons Information Centre (e.g. phone 13 11 26) or a doctor, or for at least 15 minutes. If skin or hair contact occurs, remove contaminated clothing and flush skin and hair with running water.
